_doc: Tickers for which external broker/exchange dividend feeds (Yahoo, tbank) are wholesale wrong (typically erroneous reverse-split-adjustment in upstream data). Blacklisted sources are excluded from cascade merge entirely. ISS+dohod never blacklisted — they ARE ground truth. Add new entries with explicit reason + ISS overlap evidence.

VTBR.reason: Phantom reverse-split: Yahoo ×4900, tbank ×4997. VTBR never split. Ground truth: 0.00109868 RUB/share for 2019-06 per ISS, confirmed by VTB 2013 annual report (0.00143 RUB at nominal 0.01 RUB), VKLADER table, Forbes FY2011 AGM coverage.

HIMCP.reason: Yahoo 2014-07 = 1.755 vs dohod 0.0175 (×100). Tbank has no records for HIMCP — not blacklisted there.

PHOR.reason: Yahoo 2024-07 = 309 vs dohod 15 (×20). Likely Yahoo wrong-share-class scaling or tranche aggregation. Tbank has no records for PHOR.

PLZL.reason: Tbank ×10 systematic bug on pre-2025-03-27 PLZL records (likely double-applying the 2025 1:10 split adjustment). Verified against Polyus IR + dohod + smart-lab + Forbes — ISS values match official board declarations exactly. Polyus had only ONE split in history (2025-03-27). Yahoo for PLZL works fine, not blacklisted.

UDMN.reason: Tbank misdated UDMN dividends by one year — 2020-07 record (182.54 RUB per ISS for FY2019) is reported as 1022.48 RUB which is actually the 2021-07 FY2020 figure. Year-shift bug. Verified via dohod + Udmurtneft IR.

RTKM.reason: Yahoo 2015-07 = 0.65 vs ISS 3.34 (×0.195). Likely Yahoo's pipeline confused Rostelecom common (RTKM) with prefs (RTKMP) or applied ADR ratio incorrectly. ISS canonical per dohod + smart-lab + Rostelecom IR.

NKHP.reason: Both Yahoo and tbank carry 30.43 for 2024-10-07 vs ISS 22.19. ISS confirmed by Forbes article on AGM vote for H1-2024 = 22.19 RUB. Both external feeds likely fetched from a common upstream that mis-aggregates.

RKKE.reason: Yahoo systematically reports net-of-13%-tax (ratio 0.8745 vs tbank gross). Legacy CSV matches tbank exactly for 2010-2016 payouts (26/100/280/172/95/135). Yahoo also adds 2 phantom records (2014-07-30, 2015-01-30 both 83.07) not present in legacy or tbank. Tbank is authoritative; ISS has no records for RKKE.

UNAC.reason: Tbank truncates sub-millikopeck amounts (2014-07: yahoo=0.000779 matches legacy CSV exactly; tbank=0.0008 is rounded to 4 decimals). For kopeck-precision tickers yahoo is authoritative. ISS has no records for UNAC.
